sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22612" key="gomfi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γομφ-ίτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, o(</foreign> (fort. sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νάρδος</foreign>), a kind of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">στύραξ</foreign>, Aet.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg008.perseus-grc1:1:131" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.131</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0724.tlg002:2:460D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Steph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Hp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.460D.</biblScope> </bibl> </entryFree>
